title: President Loki
content:
{{Otheruses|Loki}} {{CharHub|President Loki|Loki}} {{AltUniverse|3=Characters}} {{Character |image = President Loki Official.jpg |real name = Loki Laufeyson |alias = {{Alias |codenames = President Loki{{Ref|LK105}}}} |species = [[Frost Giant]] |citizenship = [[Jotunheim|Jotun]] (formerly)
{{Citizenship|ASG2}} (formerly) |gender = Fluid[[:File:Loki Promo File.jpeg|Loki's TVA File]] |title = Prince of Asgard (formerly)
President |affiliation = [[Loki Bandits]] (formerly) |tv series = ''[[Loki (TV series)|Loki]]''
*''[[Journey Into Mystery]]'' |docuseries = ''[[Legends]]''
*''[[Variants]]'' |actor = [[Tom Hiddleston]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You give me your [[Loki Bandits|army]] and I take the throne."
"Ah, yes. Not so good a bargain. How about this one? My army, my throne?|[[Boastful Loki]] and President Loki|Journey Into Mystery}} President '''Loki Laufeyson''' is a Variant of [[Loki]] who commanded an [[Loki Bandits|army of Loki Variants]] in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]]. Seeking to overthrow [[Kid Loki]], President Loki coordinated a coup with [[Boastful Loki]] while intending to betray him but was ultimately double-crossed himself by his own followers. In the ensuing fight, [[Alligator Loki]] chomped off President Loki's right hand. ==Biography== ===Power Struggles=== ====Meeting His Alternate Selves==== {{Quote|Hello. Which one of [[Hub:Loki|us]] are you?|President Loki to [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]]|Journey Into Mystery}} [[File:President Loki and squad.png|{{AltFloat}}|Loki and other [[Hub:Loki|Lokis]] finding the [[Loki Palace]]]] President Loki caused a nexus event within the established Sacred Timeline. His actions made him a target of the [[Time Variance Authority]] which arrived and pruned him along with his reality. He ended up in the [[Void (End of Time)|Void]] as a result, where he met other Variants of [[Loki]] who ultimately became part of his [[Loki Bandits|army]]. President Loki was considered dangerous by other Lokis, as [[Classic Loki]] and [[Kid Loki]] wanted to avoid him and his army at all cost. However, he eventually made a deal with [[Boastful Loki]] who would betray both Classic and Kid Loki in exchange of President Loki's army. [[File:Loki Stills 55.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Loki is suddenly betrayed by his followers]] Alongside with the other Loki Variants, President Loki arrived at the [[Loki Palace|hideout]] of the [[Hub:Loki|Lokis]] just as another [[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki Variant]] was about to leave, with President Loki questioning which one of them this new Loki was, only for the Variant to call the situation a nightmare. [[Boastful Loki]] revealed that he had betrayed his comrades to President Loki and gave him their location and promised him shelter and supplies while Boastful Loki would get the throne and President Loki's army in exchange. [[File:ScreamingPresidentLokiHandBittenOff.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Loki loses one of his hands to [[Alligator Loki]]]] Having just officially betrayed his accomplice, President Loki enjoyed his victory and gloated that the Void belonged to him, as it was his army and his throne. President Loki was shocked once his own Loki Variants turned on him, infuriating him. [[Alligator Loki]] attacked him and bit off his right hand, prompting a high-pitched scream from the Loki Variant. A battle erupted between the Loki Variants for supremacy with one Variant slamming President Loki headfirst into a popcorn machine at one point. [[Classic Loki]] used his magic to create a distraction for him and his companions to escape by sending projections of them into battle.{{Ref|LK105}} ==Abilities== *'''Master Tactician''': President Loki was a great tactician who was proclaimed as the President of his own group of [[Loki Bandits]]. As part of his strategy to defeat [[Kid Loki's Crew]], President Loki made a deal with [[Boastful Loki]] to lead the bandits to their [[Loki Palace|hideout]]. Once inside, President Loki turned on Boastful Loki, only to be turned on himself by [[Warrior Loki]] and the others. ==Equipment== *'''[[Horned Helmet]]''': President Loki wears a smaller version of horned helmet. ==Relationships== ===Enemies=== *[[Time Variance Authority]] *[[Alioth]] - Attempted Killer *[[Kid Loki's Crew]] - Alternate Selves **[[Kid Loki]] **[[Classic Loki]] † **[[Alligator Loki]] **[[Loki/New York Time Heist|Loki]] *[[Boastful Loki]] - Alternate Self and Temporary Ally *[[Loki Bandits]] - Alternate Selves and Former Subordinates **[[Mustache Loki]] **[[Glamshades Loki]] **[[Bicycle Loki]] **[[Pokey Loki]] **[[Warrior Loki]] **[[Goth Loki]] **[[Ninja Loki]] **[[Assassin Loki]] **[[Military Loki]] ==Trivia== *President Loki's outfit is a reference to Loki's appearance in the ''[[w:c:marvel:Vote Loki Vol 1|Vote Loki]]'' comic series. It is a four-part comic series in which Loki runs for president of the [[United States of America]] after returning to Earth. ==References== {{Gallery|President Loki/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel|Loki}} [[ru:Президент Локи]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Loki (TV series) Characters]] [[Category:Legends Characters]] [[Category:Frost Giants]] [[Category:Genderfluid Characters]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Blue Eyes]] [[Category:Politicians]] [[Category:Royalty]] [[Category:Gods]] [[Category:Variants Monitored by the TVA]] [[Category:Pruned]] [[Category:LGBTQIA+ Characters]]
